title: Tunisia crash out of World Cup after devastating defeat to Japan

snapshot.title: Tunisia crash out of World Cup after devastating defeat to Japan
snapshot.description: RIYADH: The 1,000th match in FIFA World Cup history — at Estadio BBVA in Guadalupe, Monterrey — brought Tunisia and Japan together in a meeting that carried major consequences for both teams. Japan needed a convincing victory to keep pace with the Netherlands, who had thrashed Sweden 5-1 earlier in the day. For Tunisia, defeat would bring their hopes of reaching the Round of
snapshot.author: Mohammed Fayad
snapshot.pageTitle: Tunisia crash out of World Cup after devastating defeat to Japan | Arab News
